name: Chocolate Chip Butter Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Mix in the sifted dry ingredients, alternating with milk and vanilla, adding in thirds and beating until smooth after each addition.
4. Grate the chocolate coarsely and set aside 1/3 cup for topping.
5. Beat the egg whites to stiff peaks and gently fold into the batter.
6. Add the remaining chocolate to the batter and mix well.
7. Pour the mixture into a greased and floured 9x13 inch pan.
8. Sprinkle the grated chocolate over the top of the batter.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 40 minutes.
Source: "The Yankee Kitchen" 03-18-93 (#2) [Bea Roe]
